title: MCP Chat
description: AI-powered chat assistant for OpenMetadata. Connects to an LLM provider and uses MCP tools to search, explore, and manage metadata through natural language.

llmProvider.title: LLM Provider
llmProvider.description: The LLM provider to use for the chat assistant.

llmApiKey.title: LLM API Key
llmApiKey.description: API key for the selected LLM provider.

llmModel.title: LLM Model
llmModel.description: The model to use. For example: gpt-4o, claude-sonnet-4-20250514.

llmApiEndpoint.title: LLM API Endpoint (Optional)
llmApiEndpoint.description: Custom API endpoint URL. Leave empty to use the provider's default endpoint.

systemPrompt.title: System Prompt
systemPrompt.description: The system prompt that guides the assistant's behavior.
systemPrompt.default: You are a helpful metadata assistant for OpenMetadata. Use the available tools to search, explore, and manage metadata. Be concise and actionable.
